name: Valerian Root Extract
summary: Valerian Root Extract is tracked for Enhances GABA signaling by inhibiting breakdown and increasing receptor activity with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
